{"credits": [{"type": "analyst", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/99596518?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Nuhiat-Arefin/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Nuhiat-Arefin/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Nuhiat-Arefin/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Nuhiat-Arefin/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Nuhiat-Arefin", "id": 99596518, "login": "Nuhiat-Arefin", "node_id": "U_kgDOBe-45g", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Nuhiat-Arefin/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Nuhiat-Arefin/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Nuhiat-Arefin/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Nuhiat-Arefin/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Nuhiat-Arefin/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Nuhiat-Arefin", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-55865", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-835", "name": "Loop with Unreachable Exit Condition ('Infinite Loop')"}], "description": "### Impact
Given a malformed `{% case %}` tag without associated `{% when %}` or `{% else %}` block, and no terminating `{% endcase %}` tag, Python Liquid hangs in an infinite loop at parse time. This allows malicious template authors to craft templates for a denial of service attack.

### Patches
The issue is fixed in version 2.2.1 with the correction of the `liquid.TokenStream.eof` attribute. The `kind` and `value` of the special EOF token are now the same, so either can be tested against `liquid.token.TOKEN_EOF`.

### Workarounds
Manually correct the definition of `liquid.TokenStream.eof` before parsing any templates.

```python
import liquid
from liquid.token import TOKEN_EOF

liquid.stream.TokenStream.eof = liquid.Token(TOKEN_EOF, TOKEN_EOF, -1, "")

# ...
```", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00451, "percentile": 0.36246}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-vq2f-vcc9-j8mv", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-19T20:46:34Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-vq2f-vcc9-j8mv", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-vq2f-vcc9-j8mv"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-55865"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-19T20:46:34Z", "references": ["https://github.com/jg-rp/liquid/security/advisories/GHSA-vq2f-vcc9-j8mv", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-vq2f-vcc9-j8mv"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/jg-rp/liquid/security-advisories/GHSA-vq2f-vcc9-j8mv", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/jg-rp/liquid", "summary": "Python Liquid: Infinite loop when parsing malformed `{% case %}` tags", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-19T20:46:35Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-vq2f-vcc9-j8mv", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.2.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "python-liquid"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2.2.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Python Liquid: Infinite loop when parsing malformed `{% case %}` tags
